inputs.label: Total Sales
inputs.businessContext: Total monetary value of sales closed in the commission period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total monetary value of sales closed in the commission period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Komisyon döneminde kapatılan satışların toplam parasal değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Geldwert der im Provisionszeitraum abgeschlossenen Verkäufe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur monétaire totale des ventes conclues au cours de la période de commission.

inputs.label: Commission Rate
inputs.businessContext: Standard commission rate applied to total sales.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard commission rate applied to total sales.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam satışlara uygulanan standart komisyon oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de commission standard appliqué aux ventes totales.

inputs.label: Target Sales
inputs.businessContext: Sales threshold above which a bonus is earned.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sales threshold above which a bonus is earned.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umsatzschwellenwert, ab dem ein Bonus verdient wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Seuil de ventes au-dessus duquel une prime est gagnée.

inputs.label: Bonus Rate
inputs.businessContext: Additional commission rate applied to sales above target.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional commission rate applied to sales above target.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedefin üzerindeki satışlara uygulanan ek komisyon oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Provisionssatz, angewendet auf Umsätze über dem Ziel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de commission supplémentaire appliqué aux ventes au-dessus de l'objectif.

inputs.label: Base Salary
inputs.businessContext: Fixed base salary regardless of sales.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed base salary regardless of sales.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire de base fixe indépendant des ventes.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
